title: Rebuild exact Release 1216 without production drift
description: Stage and compile exact qualified Release 1216 and enforce its committed byte count, checksum, and SHA-256.
close_reason: The persistence workflow stages the exact Release 1216 manifest, rejects production test verbs, and verifies the locked 211,968-byte artifact identity fail-closed.

title: Build an isolated persistence laboratory
description: Compile deterministic setup, mutation, and report verbs only into a separate test story.
close_reason: The include patch is applied only after exact production staging, and production is scanned for every setup verb and module name.

title: Prove troll and egg object-graph restoration
description: Save, mutate, and restore the bound troll, prepared intact egg, and canonical broken egg/canary states.
close_reason: Dedicated routes assert ordered pre-save, mutated, and restored reports for flags, passages, rope, axe, nest, sack, egg, and broken consequence objects.

title: Prove dam mechanism restoration
description: Restore interlock, gates, tide, water level, leak visibility, room light, repair, and discovery state.
close_reason: The dam route verifies direct state reports followed by restored MELZAR and RECAP output.

title: Prove completed ritual restoration
description: Restore learned ceremony state, completed exorcism, removed ghosts, canonical XC, and the cool bell object.
close_reason: The ritual route verifies deterministic state reports plus completed CEREMONY and RECAP output after restoration.

title: Prove clock interrupt restoration
description: Restore the queued production troll-recovery interrupt and verify it fires after its preserved delay.

title: Complete state persistence qualification
description: Run every real SAVE/RESTORE route, finish review and docs, close the train, and leave a merge-ready PR.
